---
name: Bug Report (缺陷报告)
about: Create a report to help us improve Kuaiyou Master (向我们报告 Bug)
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

**Describe the bug (问题描述)**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is. (清晰简洁地描述该 Bug 是什么。)

**To Reproduce (复现步骤)**
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

**Expected behavior (预期行为)**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen. (描述您期望发生什么情况。)

**Screenshots (截图/录屏)**
If applicable, add screenshots or video to help explain your problem. (如果可能，请提供截图或录屏来解释问题。)

**Environment (运行环境):**
 - OS (操作系统): [e.g. macOS 14, Windows 11]
 - Node.js Version (Node.js版本): [e.g. 18.17.0]
 - Kuaiyou Master App Version (快游大师App版本): [e.g. 1.2.0]
 - Device Model (手机型号): [e.g. Xiaomi 14 Pro, Huawei Mate 60]
 - Connection Mode (连接模式): [LAN or ADB]

**Additional context (补充信息)**
Add any other context about the problem here. (在此添加关于该问题的任何其他上下文信息，如错误日志。)
